rag_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure binary expressions compare values of identical types (e.g., real with real, int with int).
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Type mismatches in AGREE expressions must be resolved by aligning operand types.
Implementation contracts should not contain guarantee statements; use assume or eq for declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Comparison expressions in AGREE evaluate to bool; arithmetic expressions yield int or real as appropriate.
When defining constants or equations in AGREE, ensure type consistency across all operands.
anti_patterns: Avoid mixing real and int types in binary comparisons without explicit conversion.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation-level AGREE scopes.
